name_en: New Arrival: French High-End Custom Chane1
name_cn:
New Arrival: French High-End Custom Chane1
Chane1💔24B 🖤 This Season's Little Black Horse Shell Bag A👸🏻
This season's very eye-catching glossy lambskin.
My SA was obsessed with the real thing!
I think it's the cutest bag this season, and the value for money is better than other small 'waste' bags 🥇Size:15x20x6
